summary: Completed WebSocket real-time updates testing. All 13 backend tests pass (100%). WebSocket connections work correctly for both single auction (/api/ws/auction/{id}) and all auctions (/api/ws/auctions) endpoints. Real-time bid updates, viewer count, connection status indicator, and toast notifications all function properly. Fallback polling is implemented when WebSocket disconnects.

minor.issue: Initial WebSocket connections sometimes fail with error 1006 before successfully reconnecting. This is handled by the reconnection logic but causes brief 'Verbinde...' state.

features_tested: WebSocket connection to /api/ws/auction/{id} - Single auction real-time updates
WebSocket connection to /api/ws/auctions - All auctions real-time updates
Auction state updates after bid (price, timer, last_bidder)
WebSocket bid broadcast to connected clients
Bid endpoint requires authentication (401 without token)

pages_tested: Auction Detail Page (/auctions/{id}) - WebSocket connection, real-time updates
Auctions List Page (/auctions) - WebSocket connection, auction cards
features_verified: Live connection status indicator (green 'Live verbunden' / red 'Verbinde...')
Timer reset to 15 seconds after bid
Toast notification when bid is placed ('Kunde hat geboten!')
Autobidder button present for authenticated users

websocket_implementation_details.reconnection: Automatic reconnection with exponential backoff (max 5 attempts)

critical_code_review_comments: WebSocket implementation is solid with proper connection management, broadcast functionality, and reconnection logic
The useAuctionWebSocket hook correctly handles all message types and updates state accordingly
Fallback polling is implemented in Auctions.js (10 second interval when WebSocket disconnected)

mocked_apis.payments_tab: Admin Payments tab shows mock data
mocked_apis.logs_tab: Admin Logs tab shows mock data

context_for_next_testing_agent: WebSocket real-time updates are fully functional. Test file /app/tests/test_websocket_realtime.py contains 13 tests covering WebSocket connections, bid placement, and auction endpoints. The TEST_AUCTION_ID in the test file should be updated to an active auction ID before running tests. Customer account has ~45 bids remaining for testing.
